title: Per-Slot Bid Distribution Analysis
why_now: This slice derived mean bids per slot (~1,181) from aggregates. Per-slot GROUP BY on bid trace would reveal the actual distribution shape — variance, outlier slots, and whether high-MEV slots attract disproportionately more bids.

title: Bid Timing Within Slots
why_now: This slice inferred progressive bid updating from structural evidence. Direct measurement of bid submission timestamps relative to slot boundaries would confirm or refute the last-look hypothesis and quantify the timing distribution.

title: Same-Day Bid-to-Delivery Win Rate
why_now: This slice compared bidders (2024-09-13) to delivered builders (2026-03-29, different date). Joining bid trace and delivery data for the same date would yield exact per-builder win rates, eliminating the date mismatch caveat.
